nodes.label: Breaking Changes Warning
nodes.rationale: This version of Next.js has breaking changes — APIs, conventions, and file structure may differ from AI training data. Read the relevant guide in node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before writing any code.

nodes.label: Setup Matt Pocock Skills
nodes.rationale: Scaffolds per-repo configuration that engineering skills assume: issue tracker, triage labels, and domain docs. Run before first use of to-issues, triage, diagnose, prototype, and other skills.

nodes.label: Caveman Mode
nodes.rationale: Ultra-compressed communication mode that cuts token usage ~75% by dropping filler, articles, and pleasantries while keeping full technical accuracy.

nodes.label: Grill Me Skill
nodes.rationale: Interview the user relentlessly about a plan or design until reaching shared understanding, resolving each branch of the decision tree one question at a time.
